headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Howmet Aerospace (HWM) After Its Powerful Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Howmet Aerospace's current share price reflects its underlying worth, you are not alone. That is exactly the question this article tackles. The stock last closed at US$272.54, with returns of 12.1% over 7 days, 15.5% over 30 days, 28.7% year to date, 73.5% over 1 year and a very large return over 3 and 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Howmet Aerospace's role as an aerospace and defense supplier, including its exposure to long term aircraft production...
